title: DougDoug SMP Quality of life
description: The suggested way to play on DougDoug's Minecraft Server.
body:
This modpack is the recommended way to play on DougDoug's SMP.

It contains exclusively client side mods, as well as a few shader packs.

This modpack was created by the staff of DougDoug's Minecraft server (for info on how to join visit https://dougdoug.com/minecraft ), which is hosted by Apex Hosting at https://apexhost.gg/dougdoug . 

Please keep in mind the modpack may be updated to suit the state of the SMP.
